raw_input: Helio Robotics is a B2B SaaS that helps mid-market manufacturers schedule predictive maintenance on industrial robots. We have a working MVP that ingests robot telemetry, detects anomalies and books service appointments automatically. We are a small team (5 engineers + 1 founder) and we want to reach about 50 manufacturing companies in LATAM with 50–500 employees. Our ICP is plant managers and operations directors who already track downtime as a KPI.
